name: KG Inicis
description: KG Inicis is Koreas oldest PG — card, bank transfer, virtual account and recurring billing APIs.

seo.title: KG Inicis — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: KG Inicis: KG Inicis is Koreas oldest PG — card, bank transfer, virtual account and recurring billing APIs.

when_to_use: Korean card, bank transfer, and virtual account payment integration
Recurring billing via Korean payment gateway for subscription services
Oldest Korean PG supporting all major domestic card and bank methods
E-commerce checkout for Korean platforms needing domestic PG compliance

pros: Deep Korean market presence as oldest PG
Broad coverage: cards, virtual accounts, recurring
cons: Legacy API design and SOAP remnants
Slow innovation versus newer Korean PGs
review.verdict: The conservative enterprise choice in Korea — stable and comprehensive, but DX is behind newer local gateways.
review.best_for: Large Korean merchants and enterprises wanting a proven incumbent PG
